name: Qwen2
metaDescription: Qwen2 (Alibaba (Qwen)), released 2024-06 — part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Earlier open family with 0.5B/1.5B/7B/72B dense and a 57B-A14B MoE model.
overview: Qwen2 is a large language model from Alibaba (Qwen), part of the Qwen (open-weight) line. Released 2024-06. The flagship open-weight (Apache 2.0) family spanning edge-sized dense models to large MoE models, covering general text, reasoning and agentic use.
What's notable in this version: Earlier open family with 0.5B/1.5B/7B/72B dense and a 57B-A14B MoE model.
